history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up shows a person in a white top facing a wall covered with overlapping black-and-white geometric graphics, with their hand raised toward a bright light.

Main Subject:
A person wearing a white garment stands in front of a large graphic display. Their right hand is raised toward the center, with fingers spread, and a bright circular flare appears where the hand meets the light source. The person also appears to wear a ring on one finger, and their arm is positioned vertically with the hand centered in the frame.

Setting:
The scene is indoors, with a light-colored wall or panel behind the person. The background is dominated by layered rectangular and triangular black-and-white elements and a large dark circular shape resembling a stylized object or cutout. Lighting is strong and contrasts sharply against the darker graphics.

Visual Details:
The graphics behind the person are mostly monochrome, arranged in angular, overlapping shapes that resemble facets. A dark circular area in the mid-background frames a bright white point of light, producing lens flare or glare. The person’s skin is light-toned, and their raised hand is sharply illuminated. The lower portion includes the top of the white clothing, while the upper background contains the largest geometric shapes. The camera angle is straight-on and tightly framed, emphasizing the raised hand and the central flare.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person in a white top with a raised, illuminated hand in front of a monochrome wall of overlapping geometric graphics. A bright light flare is centered behind the hand within a dark circular graphic element.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person, mostly obscured by shadow and the bright flash of a phone camera held up to take a mirror selfie. They are wearing a black hoodie with a white abstract line design on the front, and a white t-shirt underneath with a reddish, abstract, fluid-like graphic. The background is a bathroom mirror reflecting a wall with geometric, abstract mosaic tiles in shades of white, grey, and black, with some darker, marble-like patterns interspersed. The lighting is dramatic, with a strong, blown-out flash originating from the phone screen, creating lens flares and highlighting the person's hand and arm. The mood is somewhat mysterious and edgy, with a touch of modern, urban aesthetics. The color palette is dominated by monochrome tones with a subtle reddish accent from the t-shirt graphic. The person's face is entirely hidden by the phone and the flash, adding to the anonymity. The composition is a close-up, centered on the person and their reflection.
